mineverse.reverified_firsthand: 2026-07-15T10:04:51Z on a read-only shallow clone landing exactly at the pinned HEAD

retry_after_429.text: Over budget -> HTTP 429, reason_code rate_limited, plus a Retry-After header (integer seconds)

executor_unbuilt.text: to be built in the superbot repo

done_criterion.text: shim contract fixtures validate against the real endpoint (SHIM_CONFORMANCE_BASE_URL seam)

shim_eviction.text: while times and now - times[0] >= window:

superbot.reverified_firsthand: 2026-07-15T10:05Z on a read-only shallow clone landing exactly at the pinned HEAD

pin.text: only on owner-side items: the MINING_WRITE_ENDPOINT/MINING_WRITE_SHARED_SECRET pair

_grounding.harvest_anomalies: ZERO — every pinned constant and quoted line matched verbatim at the pinned HEADs

model.time: slotted, slot delta seconds, arrivals per slot unbounded non-negative integers, admitted = the schedule itself when it satisfies the limiter (the adversary sends exactly what gets admitted)
model.span_convention: half-open [a, a+L); the closed-interval bucket endpoint convention is the ONE disclosed reporting exhibit

disciplines.SLIDING: every w-second span carries <= B admits (the shim's semantics)
disciplines.FIXED_ALIGNED: tumbling w-windows anchored at 0, counter resets at boundaries
disciplines.FIXED_ADVERSARIAL: tumbling w-windows, alignment chosen by the adversary
disciplines.BUCKET: capacity B, refill B/w tokens per second applied at slot boundaries AFTER the slot, tokens capped, start full

closed_forms.N_fixed_adv: B * (ceil((L-1)/w) + 1) at delta = 1; slotted general form B * (ceil((L-delta)/w) + 1)
closed_forms.N_fixed_aligned: B * ceil(L/w) when w | L (aligned span)

T1_dead_tier.note: sustained NEVER rejects under any of the three disciplines applied uniformly; sliding and aligned-fixed contacts are registered margin-0 knife-edges (the head's thesis); bucket dead margin is the one fat margin (50 tokens vs the 1-token threshold)

T3_lattice.redundancy_law: sustained redundant under sliding iff B * ceil(T/w) <= S

hand_world_F4.pencil: sliding: two disjoint windows x 2; fixed-adv: three windows touched 2+2+2; bucket: start 2 + refill 1/s x 3 boundaries

controls_F5.discipline_ordering: N_slide <= N_bucket <= N_fixed_adv at every grid cell

arm_R.gap_law: exponential (expovariate(2.0)), one draw per event, event times cumulative from 0
arm_R.limiter: verbatim re-implementation of shim _consume_budget: deque, eviction now - times[0] >= window, reject when len >= max, Retry-After = max(1, ceil(times[0] + window - now)); rate_limit = (10, 10.0)
arm_R.per_trace_theorem_check: worst trailing 60 s admitted-window <= 60, observed contact AT 60 reported

obedient_client.behaviour: send immediately; on 429 wait exactly the Retry-After header; expect exactly 3600 admits (long-run rate exactly 1/s = the sustained rate)

disclosed_reporting_landing.policy: REPORTING-ONLY disclosed values — a mismatch is a first-class anomaly (convention C3), never a silent gate and never a gate failure

seeds.provenance: the drafter's registered allocation IS the session seed set (V077-V085 precedent); 20261640-643 are P072/V085's registered set; the gap 20261644-649 is the drafter's disclosed in-flight buffer, unused; sweep of this clone at origin/main 2370855 maxes at genuine 20261643

REJECT.R1_dead_tier: no separating schedule exists at the committed pair under sliding (N_slide(60) <= S, exhaustive-and-closed-form) AND all three uniform-discipline dead checks hold with their exact contacts (sliding 60 = S, aligned-fixed 60 = S, bucket min level = 50 >= 1)
REJECT.R2_fork: N_fixed_adv(60)/S >= 21/20 AND N_bucket(60)/S >= 21/20 (both endpoint conventions) AND the straddle N_fixed_adv(2) = 2B exactly
REJECT.R3_lattice: B*T = S*w exactly AND a separating schedule EXISTS at S = 50 under sliding AND N_slide(60) > S in the w = 7 world

decision_rule.APPROVE: a separating schedule exists under sliding at the committed pair OR (N_fixed_adv(60) <= S AND N_bucket(60) <= S)
NULL_axes: law failure without gate failure (corrected law is the finding)
convention fragility (granularity triple or bucket endpoint pair flips a decision comparison)

margin_ledger.straddle: exact equality BY LAW (2B) — no margin concept
margin_ledger.fat_margin: bucket dead check min level 50 vs the 1-token threshold
margin_ledger.policy: the registered contacts are knife-edges BY CONSTRUCTION (the head's thesis: the committed constants sit ON the degeneracy surface); gate = no UNregistered decision comparison sits at margin 0

expected_landing_disclosed: REJECT (the sim re-derives everything from scratch and must not trust these): R1 contacts (60,60) sliding, (60,60) aligned-fixed, bucket 50/1 over 600 s; R2 70 (7/6, x10/9), 69 (23/20, x23/21; closed-interval 70), straddle 20 = 2B; R3 600 = 600, S = 50 witness 60 admits, w = 7 world 90 > 60

falsifiability_worlds.S50: one committed-constant step down: sustained LIVE under every discipline (sliding separating schedule exists) — APPROVE's first clause flips
falsifiability_worlds.w7: redundancy dies by divisibility alone (90 > 60) — the T1 theorem is lattice-conditional
falsifiability_worlds.discipline_pin: a one-sentence sliding pin in the contract would moot R2's fork and degrade the finding to dead-ink only (reporting demonstration, never a decision code path)

conventions.C1: half-open spans [a, a+L); arrivals at slot starts; the closed-interval bucket convention is the one disclosed alternative exhibit
conventions.C2: Arm B is INDEPENDENTLY WRITTEN: greedy/DP maxima with feasibility-witness + matching upper bound, its own alignment enumeration, its own exhaustive small-world search, its own bucket trace, its own separating-schedule search — no closed-form reuse; the second decision evaluator reads Arm B numbers only
conventions.C3: disclosed-anchor comparison: F3 anchors are registered GATES; the disclosed Arm-R reporting landing (admitted/rejected counts, worst-window contact) is compared and a mismatch raises a FIRST-CLASS ANOMALY, never a silent gate (the V085 precedent: an anomaly census that pins a real drafter error is a headline — run the census honestly)
conventions.C4: the falsifiability worlds are named registration cells (S=50, w=7, S=70) plus the discipline-pin reporting demonstration; none adds a decision code path beyond its registered clause
conventions.C5: margin ledger computed and the no-unregistered-margin-0 gate enforced; the four registered contacts are the thesis and are gated AS equalities
conventions.C6: Arm R estimand + draw discipline pinned: one expovariate draw per event, draw counts asserted; worst trailing 60 s window computed over admitted timestamps; NO statistical gate rides Arm R
conventions.C7: seed constructor registry: exactly 20261650, 20261651, 20261652 constructed, in that order; aux 20261653 asserted never read; registry high-water 20261653 (reserved; highest read 20261652)
conventions.C8: print discipline: every registered quantity is a small integer or small Fraction; gates compare in memory FIRST and print second (the P071 hazard, inherited)
conventions.C9: canonical serialization: sorted keys, Fractions as 'p/q' strings, no timestamps in results.json or stdout (byte-identity across process runs)
conventions.C10: the obedient Retry-After client is DETERMINISTIC (no RNG); its 3600/3600 s anchor is an F3 gate
conventions.C11: bucket refill convention pinned: refill (B/w)*delta at each slot boundary AFTER the slot, capped, start full; the closed-interval exhibit adds the final boundary refill; Fraction token levels, integer admits
conventions.C12: the bucket-pair dead check carries BOTH the exact invariant argument (sustained - burst >= S - B = 50 whenever refill rates are equal and only capping breaks symmetry upward) AND an independent greedy front-load trace over the 600 s horizon; Arm B additionally verifies greedy-is-minimizer exhaustively on a scaled small world (caps 2/6, refill 1 per slot, 6 slots) as battery, disclosed here before the runner
conventions.C13: exit contract: exit 0 iff all self-checks pass and exactly one ruling token issues; anomalies do not affect the exit code
